news.title: ASX closes higher as banks bounce; NAB jumps 3.8%
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket has managed to avoid a third straight day of losses thanks to a bounce from the banking sector.

news.title: Property platform punch-up: Are home buyers and sellers being misled?
news.snippet: The two dominant property listing platforms in Australia have a long history of bitter rivalry. Now they’re fighting it out again in court.

news.title: ‘Everyone always compliments my shoes’: Shoppers flock to Betts as it shuts 20 stores
news.snippet: At lunchtime on Thursday, there was still plenty of interest in the 134-year-old shoe retailer that is slashing its store footprint amid a crunch in cashflow.

news.title: PLC Resources lights up giant new WA gold hunting ground in Murchison
news.snippet: PLC Resources has identified a large, previously unmapped gold target at its Abbotts North project in WA after a new survey revealed a major, untested structure.

news.title: New KPMG chair under fire over ‘false’ whistleblower claims
news.snippet: The new chair of KPMG has been forced to apologise just hours after he was unveiled as the firm’s first independent chairman.

news.title: Lindian fires first blast as Malawian rare earths mining kicks off
news.snippet: Lindian Resources has started active mining at its Malawi rare earths project after firing its first production blast, with first rare earths output targeted for Q4 2026.

news.title: Sydney firm raised $100k ‘for a bond that did not exist’, watchdog says
news.snippet: The financial watchdog cancelled the financial service licence of a firm for selling $100,000 worth of fake bonds purporting to be from Macquarie.

news.title: Solomon expects 'tap on shoulder' in Bombers coach race
Why F1's rumour mill is speculating futures of Piastri and Verstappen
Peer plaudits power Critical Resources battery push
news.snippet: Critical Resources’ dry cathode manufacturing tech has been validated in a peer-reviewed journal, a key step in de-risking its solid-state battery program.

news.title: Wallabies fullback earns Test recall after 1,316-day exile
